description_long: This object depicts a male police officer standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a dark blue patrol uniform featuring a buttoned shirt, matching trousers, and a utility belt equipped with various tools. The uniform includes a peaked cap with a badge, shoulder patches, and a visible chest badge, signifying official law enforcement status. The officer's belt holds items such as a radio, handcuffs, and pouches, suggesting readiness for urban patrol duties. Black shoes and a tie complete the formal appearance. The overall look is professional, with clear insignia and equipment typical of a city police officer.
description: A male police officer in a dark blue patrol uniform with a utility belt, peaked cap, and visible police insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, chest badge, tie, utility belt, and full uniform details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, facial features, and side equipment on the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, shoulder patches, and the full length of the utility belt.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the officer's profile, side of the cap, and equipment on the right side of the belt.
attribute_uniform_type: Standard dark blue police patrol uniform with long-sleeve buttoned shirt, matching trousers, black tie, utility belt, and black shoes.
attribute_headgear_style: Dark blue peaked cap with a front badge and structured crown.
